name: Timelapse
scaffolding_intent: Plays a day-night cycle effect signaling temporal progression, scaffolding setting and tense

parameters.name: isIndoor
parameters.description: Indoor scenes use warm lighting shift instead of sky gradient

parameters.name: nightOpacity
parameters.description: Opacity of the night overlay darkening

correction_intent: The scene itself depicts a FUTURE event (the manifest explicitly describes something that has not happened yet) but the child narrated it in present or past tense. NEVER use T2 when the scene is in the present and the child mistakenly used future tense ('will be' instead of 'is') — that is a grammatical error, use D4 instead.
suggestion_intent: The scene depicts or implies a FUTURE event (e.g. preparations, anticipation, plans being made) but the child hasn't used future tense or referenced what will happen next. Use T2 only when future-tense narration is grounded in the scene — NOT to generically suggest 'talk about the future'.
